name: CWT Faded Beach Neutral
notes: Clean, small left-chest logos or subtle back prints feel intentional and premium. Works beautifully for signature logo pieces or minimalist City Series touches — the softness keeps it relaxed but put-together.

name: CWT Cool Coastal Navy
notes: Clean small chest logos or large centered back prints feel timeless and intentional. Signature logo pieces or subtle motorsport lines shine.

name: CWT Vintage Americana Navy
notes: City-series landmarks or vintage racing graphics feel authentic and collected. Large back prints look premium.

name: CWT Cool Coastal Green-Gray
notes: Muted sea-mist driftwood serenity — elevated coastal without trying. Excellent modern heritage coastal feel.

name: CWT Classic Heritage Gray
notes: Steady, reliable put-together — vintage workwear updated clean. Quiet confidence, no aging tricks.

name: CWT Faded Beach Gray
notes: Soft sun-bleached coastal ease — relaxed but refined. Modern classic heritage without overstatement.

name: CWT Earthy Minimal Green-Gray
notes: Warm, restrained organic depth — luxury in simplicity. Pure quiet confidence.

name: CWT Warm Retro Taupe
notes: 1970s screen-print warmth — nostalgic but crisp. Heritage aesthetic done modern.

name: CWT Coastal Ralph Lauren Neutral
notes: Polished, low-key coastal heritage — understated wealth. Approachable premium.

name: CWT Bold Contrast Navy
notes: Sharp, confident depth — high-impact without aggression. Quiet power through contrast.

name: CWT Warm Retro Ochre
notes: Warm heritage glow, good for motorsport graphics

name: CWT Earthy Minimal Fawn
notes: Restrained warmth, ideal for signature logos on Natural/Granite.
